query:
SELECT
                    event_id,
                    resource_id as "id: _",
                    resource_schema as "schema!",
                    event_time as "event_time: DateTime<Utc>",
                    event_type,
                    event_payload as "payload: serde_json::Value"
                FROM resource_events
                WHERE resource_id = $1
                  AND resource_schema = $2
                  AND ($3 IS NULL OR event_id > $3)
                  AND ($4 IS NULL OR event_id <= $4)
                ORDER BY event_id
